g.text: ⚠ Exam Tip: Animal cells lack cell wall, chloroplasts & large central vacuole (plant features). Centrioles are animal-cell specific.
Mitochondria & chloroplasts have own DNA → endosymbiotic theory | Lysosomes: pH ~5 (acidic) | Golgi: cis (receiving) → trans (shipping)
Rough ER → Golgi → vesicles → membrane (secretory pathway) | Free ribosomes make cytoplasmic proteins
